---
title: Durable Workflow
description: Create long-running workflows that coordinate processes and handle signals
---



## Orchestrate complex, long-running processes

Durable workflows coordinate multi-step processes that can run for minutes, hours, or days. They handle external signals, human interactions, and complex business logic while maintaining durability across failures.

Perfect for approval processes, order fulfillment, user onboarding flows, and any scenario requiring orchestration of multiple services and stakeholders.
